programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Mum has bought curtain material for the soon to be newly decorated kitchen, and asks Dad to look after it while she is out. However, Dad falls asleep and mistakenly agrees that Dennis can use it as a giant sail. When Dad realises that it has gone, he calls Dennis to bring it back, but unfortunately Dennis gets into a spot of bother with the colonel, who takes the curtain material off Dennis. In an attempt to steal it back, the garden being wrecked and the kitchen is left looking like a bombsite. Dennis, Gnasher and Dad have to clean up the whole kitchen and redecorate it in time for Mum returning. When Mum decides it is time to hang the new curtains, Dennis is about to get the curtain material, but Mum reveals that she has changed her mind and bought new curtains instead. Followed by 'Fangs for the Memories'

programme.title: Sonic Underground

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Sonic becomes aggravated that maybe their efforts of fighting for freedom seem pointless. Sonia suggests that they go to the Oracle for advice.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Sonic, Manic and Sonia find an abandoned baby in an alley and begin to look for the baby's parents. Manic becomes very fond of the child.

programme.desc: Sonic leaves Tails in charge of protecting a squirrel village food supply, when he zips off to stop a dam from breaking. Robotnik sends Scratch and Grounder after Tails.

programme.title: Car Wars

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia
programme.desc: S1:E20 The Magic Seeds - When Chelsea and Barbie discover a strange seed pod in their yard, Chelsea imagines herself in Sweetville, where everyone is planting crops for the Country Fair. But when her planting of a magic seed yields a super-big pumpkin which is impossible to, Chelsea learns that bigger isn't always better.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia
programme.desc: S1:E21 A Sound in Sweetville - Chelsea hears a scary noise coming from under her bed, and instead imagines herself in Sweetville where residents are hearing a strange noise which is causing the Candy Castle walls to shake apart.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia
programme.desc: S1:E22 It's Not Easy Being Clean - As Chelsea helps Barbie clean up her room, she wishes there was a way to do it superfast. In Sparkle Mountain, the Apprentice Queens create a mess with their spell-testing.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia
programme.desc: S1:E23 Magical Gifts of the Forest - When Barbie gives Chelsea a thoughtful gift for no particular reason, Chelsea imagines herself in Wispy Forest where everyone is picking someone to give a gift to.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia
programme.desc: S1:E24 The Sweetville Parade - As Chelsea and her friends decorate their bikes, they wonder if they could have their own parade, leading Chelsea to Sweetville where she inspires the whole town to come up with ideas to make the best parade ever.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia
programme.desc: S1:E25 The Fancy Cheese Fiasco - When Chelsea and Otto accidentally break something of Barbie's, they are afraid to tell her. In Sweetville, they break a statue and try to conceal it from Barbie before a ceremony, before learning that it's best to be honest and confess to the mistake.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia
programme.desc: S1:E26 The Tumblin' Tangleweed - Chelsea imagines herself in Wispy Forest, where everyone seems to have lost items that they did not return it to their proper place. A giant tumbling ‘tangleweed' of Wispy Forest is formed, and rolls through, picking up the stray items.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia
programme.desc: S1:E5 The Sweetest Journey - While on a nature hike with Barbie, Chelsea runs ahead as Barbie takes her own sweet time. Meanwhile in Dreamtopia, Princess Berry Swirl Barbie prepares the castle for the Sweet Pair Party, but Peanut Butter can't find Jelly, so Chelsea help him find his partner in time for the big event.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia
programme.desc: S1:E6 A Mopple Mishap - Like the game of telephone, Chelsea and her friends see just how easy it is for misunderstandings to occur. In Dreamtopia, a misunderstanding sends the Mopplekin into a panic.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia
programme.desc: S1:E7 A Staticky Situation - A rainstorm keeps Chelsea from going outside, but that doesn't stop her from thinking about Dreamtopia! She arrives in the magical world to find an outbreak of static electricity that is causing everyone's hair to stick together and threatening to ruin their Disco Dance Party.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia
programme.desc: S1:E8 The Lost Treasure of the Prism Princess - When sprinklers unexpectedly interrupt their soccer game, Chelsea and her friends must take cover in a small playhouse.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia
programme.desc: S1:E9 Four Times the Chelsea - While Chelsea works with Otto on a puzzle, his know-it-all attitude has her wishing for a friend who is just like her. In Dreamtopia, Apprentice Queen Barbie grants that wish but accidentally creates three Chelsea clones.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia
programme.desc: S1:E10 The Wispy Forest Hairathalon - At home, Chelsea is struggling to do a cartwheel but refuses Barbie's offer of help. Chelsea's imagination takes her to Dreamtopia where she finds herself participating in the Hairathalon.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia
programme.desc: S1:E11 A Winning Color Combination - When they each open up a lemonade stand, Chelsea's lemonade is too sweet and Otto's too sour. In Dreamtopia, the color green is fading. Chelsea and the Rainbow Queen Barbie must convince a bickering Yellow and Blue Junior Rainbow Princesses to restore green and harmony to Rainbow Cove.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia
programme.desc: S1:E12 The Damaged Spellbook - When Chelsea discovers that Otto has torn a page in a cookbook that he borrowed, she goes to Dreamtopia, where the Apprentice Queens perform an opposite spell that mysteriously goes haywire because Notto Prince covered up the fact that he tore a page from their spell book.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia
programme.desc: S1:E13 Concert in the Clouds - When Otto gives Chelsea a hard time about her singing out loud, Chelsea goes to Rainbow Cove, where she is asked by Rainbow Queen Barbie to perform in a concert for the Cloud Council. With the help of her friends and Barbie, Chelsea finds the courage to sing out loud and proud.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia
programme.desc: S1:E14 Forest Full of Friendship - While making friendship bracelets with Zoie, Chelsea imagines how they would share them in Dreamtopia. In Wispy Forest, friends create fantastical woven creations but struggle with sharing them until a talking tree needs help.

programme.title: The Lost Medallion
programme.desc: Billy Stone and Allie, two 13-year-old friends uncover a long-lost medallion and accidentally wish themselves back in time. In order for Billy to save Allie's life, he must give up the medallion to the evil warlord, Cobra, who rules the island…

programme.title: The Little Mermaid
programme.desc: In this "half-fish" out-of-water animated adventure, a mermaid princess makes a bargain with a sea witch to become human.

programme.title: Bedazzled
programme.desc: Elliot Richards is a hapless young man consumed by unrequited love, and desperate to change his life, he makes a deal with the Devil who slyly promises to do just that - for a price.

programme.title: My Super Ex-Girlfriend
programme.desc: A man who dumps his long-time girlfriend discovers his ex is a superhero, and she's out for revenge.

programme.title: What Happens in Vegas
programme.desc: Two strangers who drunkenly got married in Vegas fight over a huge jackpot after having their annulment denied by a judge.

programme.title: The Grand Seduction
programme.desc: Brendan Gleeson is Murray, a once proud fisherman who now, along with his former colleagues in the harbour of Tickle Head are out of work and forced to live off welfare.

programme.title: Stonados
programme.desc: When a sinister weather system develops and starts to throw off exploding bowling - ball sized stones, a former storm chaser decides to take drastic action. Stars Paul Johansson (2013).

programme.title: End Of The World
programme.desc: When Earth is threatened by solar flares, humanity must turn to an unlikely group to save the planet. Stars Greg Grunberg (2013)

programme.title: Miami Magma
programme.desc: A volcano expert and her sister have to try and shut-down an illegal oil drilling operation.

programme.title: Rex
programme.desc: Rex is based on the true-life story of young Marine Corporal Megan Leavey whose unique discipline and bond with her military combat dog saved many lives during their deployment in Iraq.

programme.title: Overboard
programme.desc: Unjustly fired by a spoilt and selfish yacht owner, Kate gets payback when he falls overboard and wakes up with amnesia...

programme.title: Big Momma's House
programme.desc: FBI agent Malcolm Turner is known best for being a brilliant, master of disguise. Malcolm's latest assignment sends him to small-town Georgia, where he's assigned to trap a brutal bank robber who the FBI suspects will be coming down to visit his ex-girlfriend Sherry and her son.

programme.title: Big Momma's House 2
programme.desc: Undercover Agent Malcolm Turner is back and this time he's out to expose the suspected designer of a deadly computer "worm" that would allow outside forces access to sophistical and critical government intelligence files.

programme.title: Ex Next Door
programme.desc: Katie Gatewood's love for her husband Dan is put to the test when Dan's obsessed ex-girlfriend Louisa moves into the house next door, intending to drive the happy couple apart by any means necessary.

programme.title: The Quake
programme.desc: In 1904 an earthquake of magnitude 5.4 on the Richter scale shook Oslo, with an epicenter in the Oslo Graben which runs under the Norwegian capital. Today, a geologist races against time to save his estranged wife and two children when a devastating earthquake of 5.3 magnitude threatens to strike Oslo, Norway again.

programme.title: Runaway Jury
programme.desc: In this suspenseful thriller, a high-priced and ruthless jury "consultant" will stop at nothing to secure a verdict on an explosive trial.

programme.title: The Last Legion
programme.desc: As the Roman empire collapses, young Romulus Augustus must leave the city and set out for a dangerous journey to Britain to locate his last legion of supporters.

programme.title: The Final Cut
programme.desc: Robin Williams, Mira Sorvino, and Jim Caviezel give dynamic performances in this mind-blowing thriller about the dark side of futuristic technology.

programme.title: Legendary
programme.desc: Cal Chetley is a bright, engaging, undersized fifteen year-old who's been picked on most of his life. Cal joins his high school wrestling team in the hopes his brother will train him. More importantly, Cal uses wrestling as the tool to reunite his family.

programme.title: In Time
programme.desc: Justin Timberlake and Amanda Seyfried co-star in this sci-fi thriller set in a future world where aging stops at 25, and the only way for one man to stay alive is to steal more time.

programme.title: Beyond Sherwood Forest
programme.desc: The Sheriff of Nottingham unleashes a monster to massacre Robin Hood's men and capture Maid Marian.

programme.title: The Princess Bride
programme.desc: A farmboy-turned-pirate encounters obstacles and enemies in his quest to be reunited with his true love.

programme.title: Three Musketeers
programme.desc: The disbanded Musketeers reunite to defeat a beautiful double agent and the scheming man she is working for.

programme.title: Robin Hood
programme.desc: An action-packed retelling of the classic legend, filled with thrilling battle sequences and epic adventure.

programme.title: Call of The Wild
programme.desc: Call of The Wild is a modern-day story incorporating elements of Jack London's classic short novel. Whilst Ryann (Ariel Gade) is staying with her Grandpa Bill (Christopher Lloyd) a wild hybrid wolf/dog shows up injured on the back porch one night. Ryann and a local friend believe they can train the magnificent animal to become a sled dog leader but first they must try and persuade Grandpa, who knows the animal will eventually have to return to the wild. Then they must stand up to the local bully who wants to claim the dog as his own.

programme.title: Cold Brook
programme.desc: One fateful evening, after working late hours at the museum, two maintenance workers see a man standing silently near a Civil War exhibit. Despite chasing him away, each night he returns. Soon Ted and George learn that no one else can see the mysterious figure dressed in centuries-old clothing his name is Gil Le Doux and he's searching for a way home.

programme.title: For the Love of Benji
programme.desc: Benji is on holiday with his family in Greece, but after getting separated at the airport, he finds himself on another exciting adventure, now on the run from international spies!

programme.title: G-Loc
programme.desc: In a world on the brink of environmental collapse, mass migration to neighbouring planet, Rhea, is humanity's final hope for survival. The only problem is, in the sixteen Earth years since the first humans landed on Rhea, two hundred and eighty-eight years have passed on the new planet and the existing population are no longer welcoming new arrivals, with the Rheans having set up a space blockade to shot down any ship that tries to cross into their territory. 'Earther', Bran, has big dreams of a better life in this new world, but the odds are stacked against him. Finding himself the lone survivor of a failed emigration attempt, his escape pod floats mindlessly in space and his oxygen is running low. His only chance of survival is to hook up to a rogue Rhean supply ship called The Nysa running on auxiliary power. But after finding the crew on board The Nysa dead, it seems Bran may have more than just a hostile planet to worry about. An intense interstellar thriller with an impressive cast, including Stephen Moyer (True Blood), Casper Van Dien (Starship Troopers) and John Rhys-Davies (the Indiana Jones and Lord of the Rings franchises).

programme.title: Non-Transferable
programme.desc: Pack your bags for a whirlwind adventure across three continents as two strangers find out if love really is transferable! On the eve of a romantic trip-of-a-lifetime, love-struck Amy is dumped by her boyfriend. And reservations are not transferable! Determined not to miss out, Amy trawls the internet for a guy with the same name. This charming, laugh-out-loud take on modern love is a must watch.

programme.title: Phoenix Forgotten
programme.desc: In search of answers to the unusual events in their Arizona town, three teens went into the desert hoping to document the incident. They disappeared that night and were never seen again. Now, on the 20th anniversary of their disappearance, unseen footage has finally been discovered, chronicling the final hours of their fateful expedition. From Producer Ridley Scott (The Martian, Prometheus) and based on the shocking, true events of March 13th, 1997, when several mysterious lights appeared over Phoenix, Arizona. This unprecedented and inexplicable phenomenon became known as The Phoenix Lights, and remains the most famous and widely viewed UFO sighting in history.

programme.title: Papillon
programme.desc: The story of Henri Papillon, a petty criminal wrongly convicted of murder in 1930s France and given a life sentence in the notorious colony on Devils Island. Whilst there, Papillon meets convicted murderer Louis Dega who agrees to help his escape in return for protection.

programme.title: Trigger Point
programme.desc: One man, one grudge and a target on his back. Disgraced U.S Secret Agent Nicolas Shaw is pulled out of hiding one last time into a world of death and espionage. With his skills put to the test and a small window of time to save a former colleague, Nicolas resorts to desperate measures to complete one last mission. Barry Pepper (The Green Mile) takes the lead in this masterclass of action-suspense.

programme.title: In The Key Of Love
programme.desc: Music producer Jake returns home for his sister's wedding. Maggie, his ex, is the Wedding photographer. Will the romantic setting help reignite the flames?

programme.title: Just The Way You Are
programme.desc: Married couple Jennie and Ian try to bring back the spark in their relationship.

programme.title: Paris, Wine and Romance
programme.desc: Winemaker Isabella travels to Paris to compete in a prestigious wine competition where she meets handsome rival Jacques. Will their passion for wine ultimately lead to love? Jen Lilley stars. (2019)

programme.title: ROYALLY EVER AFTER
programme.desc: Sara and Daniel are recently engaged. Can they get his snobbish parents to approve of the wedding?

programme.title: Lucky In Love
programme.desc: Mira has a definite idea of what her fantasy life entails.

programme.title: How to Find Forever
programme.desc: Marley's brilliant at organizing other people's engagements, but unlucky in finding romance herself. When designing her most important proposal yet, the man who could jeopardize it all may be the one who helps find her own love story.

programme.title: The Way We Weren't
programme.desc: When Charlotte and Brandon meet, they rush into marriage after failing in previous relationships. Then they discover who they've vowed to spend the rest of their lives with for better or worse.

programme.title: The Romantics
programme.desc: Oscar winner Anna Paquin and Katie Holmes prove nothing complicates love like friendship in this zeitgeist love story.

programme.title: Love & Where to Find It
programme.desc: Two local coffee shop business owners despise each other in real life, but fall in love while unknowingly sending each other messages via a dating app on their friends' behalf.

programme.title: The Song To My Heart
programme.desc: After a childhood on the road with her legendary singer-songwriter father, teashop owner BONNIE HIGHSTREET, wants nothing to do with the music business, but when she helps music sensation RYDER JAMISON, develop lyrics for his new solo album, she rekindles her long abandoned dream and falls in love.

programme.title: Looks Like Christmas
programme.desc: From cooking to decorating, Carol sleeps and breathes Christmas, so it's no wonder the town refers to her as “Christmas Carol”.

programme.title: A Song for Christmas
programme.desc: Two single parents stumble into the possibility of love for Christmas, only to discover that their daughters are embroiled in a rivalry at school. When the rivalry gets out of control, can hope and healing lead everyone to a peaceful and merry Christmas?

programme.title: Christmas in Wonderland
programme.desc: Starring Matthew Knight and Chris Kattan. Three children and their father move from California to Canada. When they go shopping at the mall, they find counterfeit cash, inadvertently help catch crooks, and make a discovery about Santa.

programme.title: Dancing Through Christmas
programme.desc: OLIVIA is picked to run the Christmas recital of The Nutcracker. When a video of Michael practising ballet with Lily goes viral, Olivia sees how much dance really means to the community. Will Olivia be able to save her dance studio with Michael's help?

programme.title: Sound Of Christmas
programme.desc: Whilst trying to reignite his daughter's passion for Christmas, Brad, falls in love with piano teacher, Lizzie. However, their romance is threatened by Brad's business interests.

programme.title: All For Love
programme.desc: Jaded romance novelist Jo Payden has a tight deadline for her latest novel. Her last novel wasn't a big success so when her editor Diana recommends teaming up Colin, a Navy SEAL who also happens to be her brother, she jumps at the opportunity. Jo's enthusiasm quickly turns to dread as she realizes that Colin has signed her up for his Navy SEAL training Boot Camp.

programme.title: Beauty and The Billionaire
programme.desc: Addison gets roped into traveling overseas with her brother and his picky billionaire boss. But clashing with the billionaire is no vacation, until he starts to have a change of heart.

programme.title: Love's Second Chance
programme.desc: Passionate fashion stylist Rose is in her 30s and living in New York. When she inherits her grandmother's vintage dress shop, she returns to her small hometown to take care of the store and bumps into her high school crush Cole.

programme.title: Follow Your Heart
programme.desc: When an eight year old girl loses her mother to cancer, her mother's last wish is for her to fall in love and find that special magical person. Twenty years later, she is alone, fired, and broke. When she and a friend decide to relocate to LA to start anew, she becomes attracted to their bus driver.

programme.title: The Preacher's Sin
programme.desc: Evan Tanner, famed preacher with a talk show and flawed family.

programme.title: I Won't Let You Go
programme.desc: Angela can't seem to shake the stalker who is ruining her life.

programme.title: Celebrity Sex
programme.desc: CA girl turns NY hedge fund VP, starts escort service, risks scandal.

programme.title: Iris Johansen's The Killing Game
programme.desc: Based on Iris Johansen's novel, this movie follows forensic sculptor Eve Duncan.

programme.title: The Preacher's Sin
programme.desc: Evan Tanner, famed preacher with a talk show and flawed family.

programme.title: Mediator
programme.desc: A family counselor in the missing children's division becomes a mediator between the living and the missing.

programme.title: Smooch
programme.desc: A rakishly handsome "English Royal" comes to America for an arranged marriage, and ends up being mugged in San Francisco's Golden Gate Park and left with amnesia.

programme.title: Seduced by Lies
programme.desc: A successful businesswoman is relieved to move on from her obsessive ex when she meets a handsome oil heir. However, romance gives way to suspicion when she discovers someone is watching her every move.

programme.title: Sweet Autumn
programme.desc: Maggie inherits half of her aunt's maple business and teams up with Dex to uncover the truth behind her will.

programme.title: 12 Days of Giving
programme.desc: A man who wins $50,000 decides to share his winnings by acting as a Secret Santa to people in a small town.

programme.title: Man Of The House (2005)
programme.desc: A hard-edged Texas Ranger is forced to go undercover as an assistant cheerleading coach to protect a group of college cheerleaders after they witness a murder.

programme.title: Rough Night
programme.desc: Five friends get a beach house in Miami for a wild bachelorette weekend that goes completely off the rails.

programme.title: The Ugly Truth
programme.desc: A romantically challenged morning show producer is reluctantly embroiled in a series of outrageous tests by her chauvinistic correspondent, host of a TV segment titled "The Ugly Truth," to prove his theories on relationships and help her find love. His clever ploys, however, lead to an unexpected result.

programme.title: Think Like A Man
programme.desc: Four friends conspire to turn the tables on their women when they discover the ladies have been using Steve Harvey's relationship advice against them.

programme.title: The Lone Ranger and the Lost City of Gold
programme.desc: Three Indians are murdered. Each was wearing a medallion when he died.

programme.title: Satan's Cradle
programme.desc: Crooked lawyer Steve Gentry plans to take over Silver City, killing Jim Mason and framing it as an accident. He then uses a fake marriage certificate to seize Mason's property. Preacher Henry Lane tries to rally the townspeople, but is attacked. The Cisco Kid and Pancho arrive to expose Gentry's plot and restore peace to Silver City.

programme.title: Reverend's Colt
programme.desc: Reverend Miller arrives in Tucson where he wants to build a church, but on the very day of his arrival a gang raids the bank and the people of Tucson, suspicious of the new reverend because he is carrying a gun, immediately blame him for the robbery.

programme.title: Four Rode Out
programme.desc: A U.S. marshal sets out to bring in a Mexican bandit accused of killing his girlfriend's father, but it turns out that there's more to the story than there first appears to be.

programme.title: South of the Rio Grande
programme.desc: When Miguel Sanchez uses stolen cattle and false accusations to have innocents killed, Cisco steps in. After rescuing a wagon under attack, Cisco discovers the victim was meant to replace Sanchez. Disguising himself as the victim, Cisco infiltrates Sanchez's operation to uncover evidence and bring justice to the rancho.

programme.title: Father's Doing Fine
programme.desc: A domestic comedy based on the play "Little Lambs Eat Ivy", dealing with the adventures of an impoverished upper-class family consisting of a widowed mother and her four daughters. The love affairs of the two unmarried daughters, some worthless shares, a thieving butler, the unpaid rent, the matrimonial difficulties of a third daughter and the approaching "accouchement" of the eldest provide the film's story.

programme.title: Constant Husband
programme.desc: An Englishman wakes in a hotel bedroom suffering from amnesia and sets out to find his identity. He tracks down his wife but soon learns that the job she saw him leave for every morning did not exist. He learns to his disgust that that is the least of his lies. He is a cad and bigamist (or, worse, he has seven wives and identities). His female lawyer tries to keep him out of jail, though he prefers incarceration to multiple matrimony.

programme.title: Here Come the Huggetts
programme.desc: The first of a famous series of British family films revolving around a Royal Wedding. The film deals with the ordinary happenings of a typical middle-class household.

programme.title: Vote for Huggett
programme.desc: Comedy film of Huggett's plans to make a lido as a war memorial and the skullduggery that nearly wrecks his chances of election as a borough councillor.

programme.title: Feminine Touch
programme.desc: Five young women arrive at St. Augustine's Hospital to take up a nursing career. They are told by the matron of the hardships and possible satisfactions that lie ahead of them. All succeed in passing their preliminary examination, and one of them falls in love with a young house doctor, Jim Alcott. She decides to give up her career to marry him, but later the experience of helping to save a patient's life and of giving fresh hope to a woman who has attempted suicide makes her change her mind and put duty first. However, the example of one of her friends who gets married and the advice of the matron persuades Susan to share Jim's career in the wilds of Canada.

programme.title: Legend
programme.desc: In a land where beauty is preserved by the innocence of those who live there, two young people become entangled in the ongoing battle between good and evil.

programme.title: In Time
programme.desc: In a future where time is literally money and aging stops at 25, the only way to stay alive is to earn, steal, or inherit more time.

programme.title: Push
programme.desc: Riveting Sci-Fi action-thriller Push is set in a deadly world of psychic espionage where the ability to move objects using only the mind, see the future, create new realities and kill without ever touching the victim can turn a person into a lethal weapon - or a target.

programme.title: Donovan's Echo
programme.desc: Donovan Matheson is a man trapped in the past. Once an esteemed physicist, he worked on the Manhattan Project but in the years that followed, he became engulfed in regret, which soon turned into an obsession with finding a way to use his work to do good.

programme.title: An Aurora Teagarden Mystery: A Bundle Of Trouble
programme.desc: (2017) Crime mystery with Candace Cameron Bure and Lexa Doig. A body on her porch. A baby in her bath. A stranger in her closet. Even for super sleuth Aurora, it's a lot to unravel...

programme.title: An Emma Fielding Mystery: Site Unseen
programme.desc: Whilst on a 17th century archaeology dig, Emma uncovers a body which leads her into a modern-day murder mystery. (2017)

programme.title: The Gourmet Detective
programme.desc: After a shocking murder at his friend's restaurant, a culinary expert uses his mastery of food, drink and cooking to solve the case. Stars Dylan Neal, Brooke Burns (2015)

programme.title: Murder 101: If Wishes Were Horses
programme.desc: A criminology professor and a private detective work together to try and solve a disappearance.

programme.title: Fixer Upper Mysteries: Framed For Murder
programme.desc: After the body of her friend's father is found in a mansion she is hired to fix, Shannon Hughes must investigate a potential murder. Starring Jewel (2017)

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Lakeview Terrace
programme.desc: A young interracial couple move into their dream home and are increasingly harassed by their next-door neighbor, a tightly wound black LAPD officer. When the couple decides to fight back the feud turns deadly.

programme.title: Kings Of South Beach
programme.desc: Based on the true story of a Miami Beach nightclub owner who takes a young employee under his wing, while trying to avoid bankruptcy and the mafia.

programme.title: The Hard Corps
programme.desc: A combat vet is hired to be a bodyguard for a former boxing champ, but complications arise when the boxer's sister falls in love with the bodyguard.

programme.title: The International
programme.desc: An Interpol agent (Owen) attempts to expose a high-profile financial institution's role in an international arms dealing ring.

programme.title: Skin
programme.desc: A black child born to white parents is cast out of white society in 1950s South Africa. The film follows her thirty-year journey to acceptance.

programme.title: Secret Window
programme.desc: A writer is stalked at his remote lakeside cabin by a psychotic stranger seeking revenge for perceived plagiarism.

programme.title: Risen
programme.desc: RISEN is the epic Biblical story of the Resurrection, as told through the eyes of a non-believer. Clavius, a powerful Roman military tribune, and his aide, Lucius, are tasked with solving the mystery of what happened to Jesus in the weeks following the crucifixion.

programme.title: Noah
programme.desc: Academy Award® winner Russell Crowe stars as Noah, a man chosen by God for a great task before an apocalyptic flood destroys the world.

programme.title: The Darkest Hour
programme.desc: Five young people find themselves stranded in Moscow, fighting to survive in the wake of a devastating alien attack.

programme.title: Born to Race
programme.desc: Born To Race is the story of Danny Krueger, a rebellious young street racer on a collision course with trouble. After an accident at an illegal street race, he is sent to a small town to live with his estranged father, a washed up NASCAR racer.

programme.title: The Sentinel
programme.desc: Compromised by his affair with the first lady, a veteran secret service agent is framed as a potential presidential assassin and must rely on a hostile former protégé to flush out the real culprit.

programme.title: Elektra
programme.desc: From the pages of Marvel Comics — creators of X-Men and Spider-Man — comes ELEKTRA, the first action-event movie of the year. In the ultimate battle between good and evil stands a warrior who makes the choice that tips the balance.

programme.title: 16 Blocks
programme.desc: They chose the worst man for the job. They expected him to fail, but he wasn't about to let a witness be murdered on his watch. Personal demons put Jack a New York City cop at rock bottom.
